mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mission_assignments (id, mission_id, assignee_id, assigned_by, family_id, due_date, status, points, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{missionId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{assigneeId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{assignedBy, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{familyId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{dueDate}, #{status, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.MissionStatusTypeHandler}, #{points}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, mission_id, assignee_id, assigned_by, family_id, due_date, status, points, created_at, updated_at FROM mission_assignments WHERE assignee_id = #{assigneeId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, mission_id, assignee_id, assigned_by, family_id, due_date, status, points, created_at, updated_at FROM mission_assignments WHERE family_id = #{familyId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} AND status = 'pending' ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, mission_id, assignee_id, assigned_by, family_id, due_date, status, points, created_at, updated_at FROM mission_assignments WHERE family_id = #{familyId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, mission_id, assignee_id, assigned_by, family_id, due_date, status, points, created_at, updated_at FROM mission_assignments WHERE assignee_id = #{assigneeId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} AND (due_date = #{dueDate} OR due_date IS NULL) AND status IN ('todo', 'pending') ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mission_assignments WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
mapper.select: SELECT id, mission_id, assignee_id, assigned_by, family_id, due_date, status, points, created_at, updated_at FROM mission_assignments WHERE assignee_id = #{assigneeId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} AND (due_date = #{dueDate} OR due_date IS NULL) AND status = 'approved' ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT id, mission_id, assignee_id, assigned_by, family_id, due_date, status, points, created_at, updated_at FROM mission_assignments WHERE assignee_id = #{assigneeId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} AND ( (due_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) OR (due_date IS NULL AND DATE(updated_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) ) AND status = 'approved' ORDER BY updated_at DESC
